---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for publigraphics
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Explain the problem or workflow this feature would address. Who benefits and
in what context?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision the feature working. Include function signatures,
expected input/output, or mock-ups if applicable.

```r
# Example of desired API (if relevant)
pg_new_feature(data, option = "value")
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request.
